nasb.text: but a terrifying expectation of judgment and the fury of a fire which will consume the adversaries.

esv.text: but a fearful expectation of judgment, and a fury of fire that will consume the adversaries.

cnv.text: 只好恐懼地等待著審判，和那快要吞滅眾仇敵的烈火。

ccb.text: 只有可怕的审判和烧灭敌对者的烈火等候我们。

csbs.text: 只保留了对审判的可怕等待，和那将要吞灭敌对者的嫉恨之火。
